note: Every ML score is predicted for a source run held out from fitting.
Features exclude run, event number, current, group, downstream label, and odd charge samples.
Random row split is an optimistic leakage stress test.
Flagged if current is nearly identified under run holdout.
Large row/run gap would indicate run-local leakage sensitivity.
Flagged if synthetic pile-up score nearly recovers the downstream label.
Flagged if charge residual alone nearly identifies beam current.
